recommendations.title: Rust Creek
recommendations.overview: When an overachieving college senior makes a wrong turn, her road trip becomes a life-changing fight for survival in rural Kentucky.

recommendations.title: The Toybox
recommendations.overview: An estranged family take a trip to the desert in their used RV and become stranded and isolated in the scorching terrain. They soon learn their RV holds terrible, haunting secrets, and it starts killing them off one by one.

recommendations.title: Sorority House Massacre
recommendations.overview: Upon joining a sorority, Beth is plagued by nightmares of a knife-wielding killer, when her past comes back to haunt her.

recommendations.title: Walking Out
recommendations.overview: A city teen travels to Montana to go hunting with his estranged father, only for the strained trip to become a battle for survival when they encounter a grizzly bear.

recommendations.title: Kill
recommendations.overview: When an army commando finds out his true love is engaged against her will, he boards a New Dehli-bound train in a daring quest to derail the arranged marriage. But when a gang of knife-wielding thieves begin to terrorize innocent passengers on his tr

recommendations.title: Animal
recommendations.overview: When plans for a weekend vacation hit a dead end, a group of close-knit friends find themselves stranded in unfamiliar territory, pursued by a menacing predator. Holed up in an isolated cabin, tensions mount as long-buried secrets are revealed. As th

recommendations.title: Deep
recommendations.overview: Four insomniac med school students are lured into a neuroscience experiment that spirals out of control and must find a way out before it’s too late.
recommendations.director: Thanabodee Uawithya, Jetarin Ratanaserikiat, Apirak Samudkitpaisan, Sita Likitvanichkul, Adirek Watleela

recommendations.title: 4L
recommendations.overview: To find Joseba, a dying friend, and see him reunite with his daughter Ely, two old friends, Jean Pierre and Tocho, embark with her on a road trip through the Sahara desert, from Spain to Mali.

recommendations.title: A Nightmare on Elm Street 3: Dream Warriors
recommendations.overview: A psychiatrist, familiar with the knife-wielding dream demon Freddy Krueger, helps teens at a mental hospital battle the killer who is invading their dreams.

recommendations.title: Bottom of the World
recommendations.overview: On their road trip through the southwestern desert, Alex and his girlfriend Scarlett arrive in a town in the middle of nowhere and take a room in a mysterious hotel so that Scarlett, who is feeling increasingly ill, can get some rest.
